text.title: Resource Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf is a `conclusion` element referencing a rule id; this ensures the tree stays in lock-step with the rule set.

decision-tree.root-question: Is there a maintained roster + task estimates + critical path?

branch.when: inputs_ready == true AND utilisation_capped == true AND skills_matched == false
inputs_ready == true AND utilisation_capped == true AND skills_matched == true

example.trace: inputs_ready=true → utilisation_capped=true → skills_matched=true → weekly actuals show 15% delta = within tolerance.
